revision.comment: removed hidden structure, did some major changes, see talk
added historical and curtural (simlar to national and patriotic)
why use static gregorian dates, when we can use automagic :)
rm local name as official name already existed, just wrongly typed
to be sure of initial capitalize
to be sure of initial capitalize
changed font sizes, + padding for holiday title
no need to point out that we use Gregorian dates
Reverted edits by [[Special:Contributions/66.235.35.68|66.235.35.68]] ([[User talk:66.235.35.68|talk]]) to last version by Some thing
robot Adding: ar, hi, hu, id
Reverted edits by [[Special:Contributions/AkhtaBot|AkhtaBot]] ([[User talk:AkhtaBot|talk]]) to last version by Pathoschild
revert back to infobox version, code is much cleaner
Reverted edits by [[Special:Contributions/71.97.55.197|71.97.55.197]] to last version by Bryan Derksen ([[WP:HG|HG]])
added ability to autogenerate single date each year; e.g. First Monday of March: weekday_ordinal=first|weekday=Monday|month=March
weekday_ordinal -> week_ordinal on new parameter - because it makes more sense
general cleanup. now that all the articles using the deprecated color attrib have been fixed, rm the categorisation
hide infobox title, allow it to inherit from the article
colour lozenge is nice, but the padding changes are excessive
broken bot putting links on wrong page. operator updated
Removed -moz-border-radius; unsuitable and overdecorates the infobox

revision.text:
<includeonly>[[File:Untitled-1.svg]]</includeonly>
{{ infobox
| abovestyle = background-color: {{#switch:{{lc:{{{type|}}} }}
| islam|islamic                        = lightgreen
| judaism|juda|jewish|jew              = lightskyblue
| buddhism|buddhist|buddha             = palegoldenrod
| christian|christ|christianity        = lavender
| asian festival                       = rosybrown
| secular                              = darkgray
| national|international|local|group   = mediumorchid
| historical|cultural|patriotic|ethnic = lightsalmon
| pagan                                = darkkhaki
| commercial                           = hotpink
| hindu|hinduism                       = orange
| transparent }}

| above      = {{{holiday_name|<includeonly>{{PAGENAME}}</includeonly>}}}
| image      = {{#if:{{{image|}}}|[[Image:{{{image<noinclude>|placeholder.png</noinclude>}}}|250px|{{{holiday_name}}}]]}}
| caption    = {{{caption|}}}

| label1     = Official name
| data1      = {{{official_name|}}}
| label2     = Also called
| data2      = {{{nickname|}}}
| label3     = Observed by
| data3      = {{{observedby|}}}
| label4     = Type
| data4      = {{{longtype|{{ucfirst:{{{type|}}}}}}}}
| label5     = Significance
| data5      = {{{significance|}}}
| label6     = Begins
| data6      = {{{begins|}}}
| label7     = Ends
| data7      = {{{ends|}}}
| label8     = Date
| data8      = {{#if:{{{date|}}}|{{{date}}}|{{#if:{{{week_ordinal|}}}|{{ucfirst:{{{week_ordinal|}}}}} {{ucfirst:{{{weekday|}}}}} in {{ucfirst:{{{month|}}}}}}}}}
| label9     = {{#time:Y|last year}} date
| data9      = {{{date{{#time:Y|last year}}|{{#if:{{{week_ordinal|}}}|[[{{{month}}} {{weekday in month|{{{week_ordinal}}}|{{{weekday}}}|{{{month}}}|{{#time:Y|last year}}}}]]|}}}}}
| label10    = {{#time:Y}} date
| data10     = {{{date{{#time:Y}}|{{#if:{{{week_ordinal|}}}|[[{{{month}}} {{weekday in month|{{{week_ordinal}}}|{{{weekday}}}|{{{month}}}|{{#time:Y}}}}]]|}}}}}
| label11    = {{#time:Y|next year}} date
| data11     = {{{date{{#time:Y|next year}}|{{#if:{{{week_ordinal|}}}|[[{{{month}}} {{weekday in month|{{{week_ordinal}}}|{{{weekday}}}|{{{month}}}|{{#time:Y|next year}}}}]]|}}}}}
| label12    = Celebrations
| data12     = {{{celebrations|}}}
| label13    = Observances
| data13     = {{{observances|}}}
| label14    = Related to
| data14     = {{{relatedto|}}}

}}<noinclude>{{documentation}}<!-- Add cats and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! --></noinclude>

revision.comment: [[WP:UNDO|Undid]] revision 325747785 by [[Special:Contributions/H Debussy-Jones|H Debussy-Jones]] ([[User talk:H Debussy-Jones|talk]]) self-revert
lighter shade of blue for better legibility of black text
type=default color to match docs and original proposal for coloring (no objection on talkpage)
add liturgical color if applicable to the group which observes the holiday
Edit data for litcolor, as it is in the description
better color - so text is readable
some festivals or holidays are started by some rulers and kings thats why we need this too
Changed protection level of Template:Infobox holiday: [[Wikipedia:High-risk templates|Highly-visible template]] (TW) (‎[edit=autoconfirmed] (indefinite))
empty to fix bold (otherwise empty is display, find missing 2013/2014 dates
move repeated switch statements to a subtemplate, revert if this borked something, but checked in the sandbox
complete re-order sequence of fields (see prev. edit
Undid revision 587034205 by [[Special:Contributions/Starcheerspeaksnewslostwars|Starcheerspeaksnewslostwars]] ([[User talk:Starcheerspeaksnewslostwars|talk]]) that's not it.
fix the problem caused by empty parameters
One more (why are these categories declared twice?)
add lc: magic word for duration
remove [[Category:Holidays and observances by scheduling ({{#if:{{{scheduling|}}}|{{{scheduling}}}|to be determined}})]] - see [[Wikipedia:Categories for discussion/Log/2015 April 25]]
Comment-out for traceability, rather than deleting obsolete category
tidy style for better HTML5 compatibility
Reinstate category for scheduling – I only intended to remove it if it resulted in "to be determined"
try again, to remove the scheduling category only if the scheduling parameter in the Infobox is blank
if exist text for duration category
trim code copied from Data18 above but not needed here
ifexist test for category by scheduling
comment-out category [[Category:Moveable holidays (manual dates for 2014)]], see [[Wikipedia:Categories_for_discussion/Log/2015_April_22#Category:Moveable_holidays_(manual_dates_for_2014)]]
duration categories have been deleted, see [[Wikipedia:Categories_for_discussion/Log/2015_May_29#Hidden_categories]]
remove Category:Holidays and observances by frequency (to be determined) per [[Wikipedia:Categories for discussion/Log/2015 August 8]]
Adding unknown parameter tracking through [[:Category:Pages using infobox holiday with unknown parameters]] using [[Module:check for unknown parameters]]
add more dates to unknown parameter check
replace {{PAGENAME}} with {{PAGENAMEBASE}} to remove any disambiguation if article name is used as infobox title, using [[Project:AWB|AWB]]
